race.comment: GAYLORD (1) continued his good form this prep when a closing second last start over 1000m at Grafton in a Class 2. Finds an easier race today and is more at home over this slightly longer journey. Ready to win. PERSONAL SPACE (11) led but her condition gave out late in the piece last start when fresh from a 46-day break. Won't mind the extra trip today and is sure to be prominent for a long way. THE PICCOLINO (6) returned to form last start when in the money over 1007m at Taree. Down in grade and handles heavy tracks so this looks a nice race. DUSAN (4) did a good job to finish third over this trip at Armidale two back then was less effective when back in trip last time. Can bounce back in this more suitable contest. GOLD MELODY (12) returns from a three-month spell and has won two from three when fresh in the past. Must be included in calculations.
